## TRM1.1. Terminal and airport ANS ATFM arrival delay per flight (KPI#2)

Average ATFM arrival delay in Finland was 0.18 min/arr in 2025, the first year of RP4. The **performance has improved compared to 2024**, last year of RP3, when the runway renovation in Helsinki during the summer led to a value of 0.76 min/arr, higher than usual for the airport.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of ATFM Arrival delay across Member States in 2025 was 0.97 min/arr.
